info.title: EcoPart API
info.description: EcoPart backend API for managing oceanographic particle data, projects, samples, tasks, and user accounts.

cookieAccessToken.name: access_token
cookieAccessToken.description: JWT access token stored in an httpOnly cookie.

cookieRefreshToken.name: refresh_token
cookieRefreshToken.description: JWT refresh token stored in an httpOnly cookie.

password.description: User password. Must be at least 8 characters with at least one digit, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, and one special character (@!#$%^&*()_+.,;:).

AuthJwtResponse.description: JWT token pair returned on successful login.

ChangePasswordRequest.description: Request to change the current user password.

new_password.description: New password. Must be at least 8 characters with at least one digit, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, and one special character.

email.description: Email address of the account to reset.

ResetPasswordConfirm.description: Confirm a password reset with a new password and reset token.

new_password.description: New password. Must meet complexity requirements.

reset_password_token.description: Token received in the password reset email.

location.description: Location of the field (body, query, params).

sort_by.description: Sorting statement formatted as: asc(field1),desc(field2),... Allowed order directions: asc, desc.

FilterSearchOptions.description: A single filter criterion for search endpoints.

field.description: The field name to filter on.

operator.description: The comparison operator. Allowed values: =, >, <, >=, <=, <>, IN, LIKE.

value.description: The value to compare against. Type depends on the field and operator.

SearchInfo.description: Pagination metadata returned with search results.

total.description: Total number of items matching the query.

total_on_page.description: Number of items on the current page.

EcotaxaInstanceRequestCreation.description: Request body for creating a new EcoTaxa instance.

EcotaxaAccountLogin.description: Request body for logging into an EcoTaxa account.

ecotaxa_instance_id.description: EcoTaxa instance ID to log into.

ecotaxa_account_ecotaxa_id.description: User ID in the EcoTaxa system.

bodc_url.description: BODC vocabulary URL for this instrument.

PublicPrivilege.description: Project privilege information with members, managers, and contact.

ProjectRequestCreation.description: Request body for creating a new project.

root_folder_path.description: Path to the project root data folder.

project_description.example: Survey of marine particles in the Mediterranean Sea.

override_depth_offset.description: Optional depth offset override in meters.

enable_descent_filter.description: Whether to enable the descent filter.

privacy_duration.description: Duration in months for which the project data is private.

visible_duration.description: Duration in months for which the project data is visible (metadata only).

public_duration.description: Duration in months for which the project data is fully public.

instrument_model.description: Name or ID of the instrument model.

members.description: List of project members (users with view access).

managers.description: List of project managers (users with full access).

ecotaxa_project_id.description: Linked EcoTaxa project ID (null if none).

ecotaxa_instance_id.description: EcoTaxa instance ID for the linked project.

new_ecotaxa_project.description: Whether to create a new EcoTaxa project.

ecotaxa_account_id.description: EcoTaxa account ID to use for project creation.

ProjectUpdate.description: Request body for updating a project. All fields are optional.

root_folder_path.description: Path to the project root data folder.

override_depth_offset.description: Optional depth offset override in meters.

enable_descent_filter.description: Whether to enable the descent filter.

privacy_duration.description: Duration in months for private data access.

visible_duration.description: Duration in months for visible data access.

public_duration.description: Duration in months for public data access.

PublicProjectResponse.description: Public project information returned by API endpoints.

root_folder_path.description: Path to the project root data folder.

enable_descent_filter.description: Whether the descent filter is enabled.

privacy_duration.description: Duration in months for private access.

visible_duration.description: Duration in months for visible access.

public_duration.description: Duration in months for public access.

ProjectBackupRequest.description: Request body for project backup operations.

skip_already_imported.description: Whether to skip samples that have already been imported.

ProjectBackupExportRequest.description: Request body for exporting a project backup.

out_to_ftp.description: Whether to export the backup to FTP.

SampleImportRequest.description: Request body for importing samples into a project.

samples.description: List of sample names/identifiers to import.

backup_project.description: Whether to also create a project backup after import.

backup_project_skip_already_imported.description: Whether to skip already imported samples in the backup.

success.description: Whether the overall operation was successful.

errors.description: Error details if any operation failed.

PublicSample.description: Public sample information returned by API endpoints.

sample_creation_date.description: Sample creation date in ISO format.

optional_structure_id.description: Optional structure ID (e.g., Argo or Glider ID).

latitude.description: Latitude in decimal degrees (negative for South).

longitude.description: Longitude in decimal degrees (negative for West).

sea_state.description: Description or classification of sea state.

instrument_settings_process_datetime.description: Process date and time in ISO format.

visual_qc_status_label.description: Quality check status label (e.g., PENDING, VALIDATED, REJECTED).

visual_qc_validator_user.description: Quality check validator user name (format: last_name first_name (email)).

ecotaxa_sample_imported.description: Whether the sample has been imported to EcoTaxa.

TaskResponse.description: Task information returned by API endpoints.

task_owner_id.description: User ID of the task owner.

task_owner.description: Display name of the task owner.

task_log_file_path.description: Path to the task log file.

UserRequestCreation.description: Request body for creating a new user account.

password.description: Password. Must be at least 8 characters with at least one digit, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, and one special character (@!#$%^&*()_+.,;:).

user_planned_usage.description: Description of planned usage of EcoPart.

UserUpdate.description: Request body for updating user profile. All fields are optional.

valid_email.description: Whether the user email is validated.

is_admin.description: Whether the user is an administrator. Only settable by admins.

PublicUser.description: Public user information returned by API endpoints.

is_admin.description: Whether the user is an administrator.

MinimalUser.description: Minimal user information used in privilege/member listings.

SortByParam.name: sort_by
SortByParam.description: Sorting statement formatted as: asc(field1),desc(field2),... Allowed order directions: asc, desc.

post.description: Authenticate a user with email and password. Returns JWT tokens as httpOnly cookies and in the response body.

200.description: Login successful. JWT tokens are set as httpOnly cookies.

403.description: User cannot be used or email not verified.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information based on the JWT token.

post.description: Uses the refresh token cookie to generate a new access token.

200.description: New access token generated and set as cookie.

post.description: Clears the access and refresh token cookies to log the user out.
Change the password of the authenticated user. Requires current and new password.

401.description: New password must be different from old password.

post.description: Sends a password reset email to the given address. Always returns 200 to prevent email enumeration.

200.description: Reset password request email sent (or user not found, same response for security).

put.description: Completes the password reset process using a reset token and new password.

401.description: Token is not valid or no token provided.

403.description: User cannot be used or email not validated.

404.description: User not found or reset code invalid.

post.description: Create a new EcoTaxa instance (admin only).

401.description: Logged user cannot create an EcoTaxa instance.

get.description: Returns a paginated and sorted list of all instrument models.
Returns a single instrument model by ID.
Returns a list of all distinct ship names from projects.
Returns a paginated and sorted list of all projects visible to the authenticated user.

404.description: Instrument model or privileges not found.

post.description: Create a new project with instrument, privilege, and optional EcoTaxa configuration.

Returns a paginated, sorted, and filtered list of projects.

**Filtering** — Send an array of filter objects in the request body. Each filter has `field`, `operator`, and `value`.

Supported operators:
| Operator | Value type | Description |
|----------|------------|-------------|
| `=`      | string, number, boolean | Exact match |
| `<>`     | string, number, boolean | Not equal |
| `>` `>=` `<` `<=` | number | Numeric comparison |
| `IN`     | array | Value is one of the given items |
| `LIKE`   | string | Case-insensitive pattern match (`%` = any chars, `_` = one char) |

Use the string `"null"` as value to match NULL fields (`= "null"` → `IS NULL`, `<> "null"` → `IS NOT NULL`).

**Filterable fields:**
| Field | Type | Note |
|-------|------|------|
| `project_id` | number | |
| `project_title` | string | |
| `project_acronym` | string | |
| `project_description` | string | |
| `project_information` | string | |
| `cruise` | string | |
| `ship` | string | |
| `data_owner_name` | string | |
| `data_owner_email` | string | |
| `operator_name` | string | |
| `operator_email` | string | |
| `chief_scientist_name` | string | |
| `chief_scientist_email` | string | |
| `override_depth_offset` | number | |
| `enable_descent_filter` | boolean | |
| `privacy_duration` | number | |
| `visible_duration` | number | |
| `public_duration` | number | |
| `serial_number` | string | |
| `root_folder_path` | string | |
| `project_creation_date` | string (ISO timestamp) | |
| `instrument_model` | string | Computed — resolved to instrument model IDs |
| `for_managing` | boolean | Computed — restricts to projects where current user has a privilege |
| `contact` | string or number | Computed — resolved to project IDs via privilege system |
| `managers` | string or number | Computed — resolved to project IDs via privilege system |
| `members` | string or number | Computed — resolved to project IDs via privilege system |
| `granted_users` | string or number | Computed — resolved to project IDs via privilege system |

**Pagination** — Use query parameters `page` (default 1) and `limit` (default 10).

**Sorting** — Use the `sort_by` query parameter with the format `asc(field)` or `desc(field)`. Chain multiple sorts with commas, e.g. `asc(project_id),desc(project_title)`.

404.description: Instrument model or privileges not found.

patch.description: Update an existing project. Can update project info, privileges, and EcoTaxa settings.

404.description: Project, instrument, or user not found.

delete.description: Permanently delete a project and its associated data.

401.description: Logged user cannot delete this project.

post.description: Start a project backup task. Reads sample data from the filesystem and stores it in the database.

401.description: User not authorized for this project or backup already running.

404.description: Project, task type/status, or folder not found.

post.description: Start a backup export task. Exports backed-up project data, optionally to FTP.

401.description: User not authorized for this project.

404.description: Project, backup folder, or task not found.

get.description: Returns a list of sample files that can be imported for the given project.

post.description: Import selected samples into the project. Optionally triggers a backup after import.

500.description: Internal server error or partial failure.

get.description: Returns a paginated and sorted list of all samples for the given project.

404.description: Sample type or visual QC status not found.

post.description:
Returns a paginated, sorted, and filtered list of samples for the given project.

**Filtering** — Send an array of filter objects in the request body. Each filter has `field`, `operator`, and `value`.

Supported operators:
| Operator | Value type | Description |
|----------|------------|-------------|
| `=`      | string, number, boolean | Exact match |
| `<>`     | string, number, boolean | Not equal |
| `>` `>=` `<` `<=` | number | Numeric comparison |
| `IN`     | array | Value is one of the given items |
| `LIKE`   | string | Case-insensitive pattern match (`%` = any chars, `_` = one char) |

Use the string `"null"` as value to match NULL fields (`= "null"` → `IS NULL`, `<> "null"` → `IS NOT NULL`).

**Filterable fields:**
| Field | Type | Note |
|-------|------|------|
| `sample_id` | number | |
| `sample_name` | string | |
| `comment` | string | |
| `instrument_serial_number` | string | |
| `optional_structure_id` | string or null | |
| `max_pressure` | number | |
| `station_id` | string | |
| `sampling_date` | string (ISO date) | |
| `latitude` | number | |
| `longitude` | number | |
| `wind_direction` | number | |
| `wind_speed` | number | |
| `sea_state` | string | |
| `nebulousness` | number | |
| `bottom_depth` | number | |
| `instrument_operator_email` | string | |
| `filename` | string | |
| `sample_creation_date` | string (ISO timestamp) | |
| `filter_first_image` | string | |
| `filter_last_image` | string | |
| `visual_qc_status_id` | number | |
| `sample_type_id` | number | |
| `sample_type_label` | string | Computed — resolved to `sample_type_id` |
| `visual_qc_status_label` | string | Computed — resolved to `visual_qc_status_id` |

**Pagination** — Use query parameters `page` (default 1) and `limit` (default 10).

**Sorting** — Use the `sort_by` query parameter with the format `asc(field)` or `desc(field)`. Chain multiple sorts with commas, e.g. `desc(sampling_date),asc(sample_id)`.

404.description: Sample type or visual QC status not found.

delete.description: Permanently delete a sample from a project.

401.description: User cannot delete sample or project mismatch.

get.description: Returns a list of EcoTaxa sample files that can be imported for the given project.

200.description: List of importable EcoTaxa sample names.

post.description: Import selected EcoTaxa samples into the project. Optionally triggers a backup after import.

500.description: Internal server error or partial failure.

get.description: Returns a paginated and sorted list of all EcoTaxa samples for the given project.

404.description: Sample type or visual QC status not found.

delete.description: Delete one or more EcoTaxa samples from a project.

samples.description: Array of sample IDs to delete.

401.description: User cannot delete sample or project mismatch.

post.description:
Returns a paginated, sorted, and filtered list of EcoTaxa samples for the given project.

**Filtering** — Send an array of filter objects in the request body. Each filter has `field`, `operator`, and `value`.

Supported operators:
| Operator | Value type | Description |
|----------|------------|-------------|
| `=`      | string, number, boolean | Exact match |
| `<>`     | string, number, boolean | Not equal |
| `>` `>=` `<` `<=` | number | Numeric comparison |
| `IN`     | array | Value is one of the given items |
| `LIKE`   | string | Case-insensitive pattern match (`%` = any chars, `_` = one char) |

Use the string `"null"` as value to match NULL fields (`= "null"` → `IS NULL`, `<> "null"` → `IS NOT NULL`).

**Filterable fields:**
| Field | Type | Note |
|-------|------|------|
| `sample_id` | number | |
| `sample_name` | string | |
| `comment` | string | |
| `instrument_serial_number` | string | |
| `optional_structure_id` | string or null | |

| `station_id` | string | |
| `sampling_date` | string (ISO date) | |

| `ecotaxa_sample_import_date` | string (ISO timestamp) or null | |

| `visual_qc_status_label` | string | Computed — resolved to `visual_qc_status_id` |

**Pagination** — Use query parameters `page` (default 1) and `limit` (default 10).

**Sorting** — Use the `sort_by` query parameter with the format `asc(field)` or `desc(field)`. Chain multiple sorts with commas, e.g. `desc(sampling_date),asc(sample_id)`.

200.description: Paginated filtered list of EcoTaxa samples.

404.description: Sample type or visual QC status not found.

get.description: Returns a paginated and sorted list of all tasks visible to the authenticated user.

404.description: Task type or status label not found.

post.description:
Returns a paginated, sorted, and filtered list of tasks.

**Filtering** — Send an array of filter objects in the request body. Each filter has `field`, `operator`, and `value`.

Supported operators:
| Operator | Value type | Description |
|----------|------------|-------------|
| `=`      | string, number, boolean | Exact match |
| `<>`     | string, number, boolean | Not equal |
| `>` `>=` `<` `<=` | number | Numeric comparison |
| `IN`     | array | Value is one of the given items |
| `LIKE`   | string | Case-insensitive pattern match (`%` = any chars, `_` = one char) |

Use the string `"null"` as value to match NULL fields (`= "null"` → `IS NULL`, `<> "null"` → `IS NOT NULL`).

**Filterable fields:**
| Field | Type | Note |
|-------|------|------|
| `task_id` | number | |
| `task_type_id` | number | |
| `task_status_id` | number | |
| `task_owner_id` | number | |
| `task_project_id` | number or null | |
| `task_progress_pct` | number | |
| `task_progress_msg` | string | |
| `task_step` | number | |
| `task_creation_date` | string (ISO timestamp) | |
| `task_start_date` | string (ISO timestamp) or null | |
| `task_end_date` | string (ISO timestamp) or null | |
| `task_type` | string | Computed — resolved to `task_type_id` |
| `task_status` | string | Computed — resolved to `task_status_id` |
| `for_managing` | boolean | Computed — restricts to tasks owned by or related to current user |

**Pagination** — Use query parameters `page` (default 1) and `limit` (default 10).

**Sorting** — Use the `sort_by` query parameter with the format `asc(field)` or `desc(field)`. Chain multiple sorts with commas, e.g. `desc(task_id),asc(task_status_id)`.

404.description: Task type or status label not found.

get.description: Returns detailed information for a specific task.

403.description: User cannot be used or insufficient permissions.
User cannot be used or cannot delete this task.

get.description: Fetch the log file content for a specific task. Available to admins, task owners, and project members/managers.

403.description: User cannot be used or insufficient permissions.

get.description: Stream the ZIP file produced by a task. Available to admins, task owners, and project members/managers.

403.description: User cannot be used or insufficient permissions.

get.description: Returns a list of all distinct organisation names from registered users.
Returns a paginated and sorted list of all users. Requires authentication.

post.description: Register a new user account. Does not require authentication. A confirmation email will be sent.

403.description: User already exists or is deleted.

post.description:
Returns a paginated, sorted, and filtered list of users.

**Filtering** — Send an array of filter objects in the request body. Each filter has `field`, `operator`, and `value`.

Supported operators:
| Operator | Value type | Description |
|----------|------------|-------------|
| `=`      | string, number, boolean | Exact match |
| `<>`     | string, number, boolean | Not equal |
| `>` `>=` `<` `<=` | number | Numeric comparison |
| `IN`     | array | Value is one of the given items |
| `LIKE`   | string | Case-insensitive pattern match (`%` = any chars, `_` = one char) |

Use the string `"null"` as value to match NULL fields (`= "null"` → `IS NULL`, `<> "null"` → `IS NOT NULL`).

**Filterable fields:**
| Field | Type |
|-------|------|
| `user_id` | number |
| `first_name` | string |
| `last_name` | string |
| `email` | string |
| `valid_email` | boolean |
| `is_admin` | boolean |
| `organisation` | string |
| `country` | string |
| `user_planned_usage` | string |
| `user_creation_date` | string (ISO timestamp) |
| `confirmation_code` | string or null |
| `reset_password_code` | string or null |
| `deleted` | string (ISO timestamp) or null |

**Pagination** — Use query parameters `page` (default 1) and `limit` (default 10).

**Sorting** — Use the `sort_by` query parameter with the format `asc(field)` or `desc(field)`. Chain multiple sorts with commas, e.g. `asc(last_name),desc(user_id)`.

patch.description: Update an existing user's profile. Requires authentication. Users can update their own profile; admins can update any user.

401.description: Unauthorized to update this user or property.

403.description: User cannot be used or is deleted.

delete.description: Permanently delete a user account. Users can delete their own account (which also logs them out); admins can delete any user.

401.description: Logged user cannot delete this user.

403.description: User cannot be used or is deleted.

get.description: Validates a user's email using the confirmation token sent by email.

parameters.name: confirmation_token
parameters.description: The confirmation token from the welcome email.

403.description: User validation forbidden or user is deleted.

404.description: Cannot find user with confirmation code.

post.description: Link an EcoTaxa account to the specified user by providing EcoTaxa credentials.

403.description: User cannot be used or EcoTaxa login forbidden.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of EcoTaxa accounts linked to the specified user.

delete.description: Unlink an EcoTaxa account from the specified user.

parameters.name: ecotaxa_account_id
parameters.description: The EcoTaxa account ID to unlink.

200.description: Successfully logged out from EcoTaxa account.

403.description: User cannot be used or cannot logout.
